name: the-talus-field-editorial
//: The editorial site is static by design: no build step, no dependencies. This file exists solely because the Cloudflare Workers Build for the root worker runs `npm run build` before deploying; without it the deploy dies on ENOENT. Dev tooling lives in scripts/ with its own package.json. Do not add dependencies here.

scripts.build: echo 'Static editorial site: nothing to build. Deploy uploads the repo root as Worker assets per wrangler.jsonc and .assetsignore.'
